events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the back-pitched condensing PVC vent is a **fail**, **high risk** — condensate will pool instead of draining to the trap, risking blocked venting, freeze-ups, joint leaks, and flue gas/CO spillage. Immediate control is to halt firing the unit, re-slope the pipe back toward the appliance (min. 1/4"/ft per NFPA 54 and manufacturer instructions), re-support it, clear the trap/drain, and verify proper drainage and combustion venting before startup.
